plugin.name: SecurityAudit
plugin.author: Mario Prospero
plugin.description: Security audit plugin for GLPI 11: activity logs, real-time alerts, weak password detection and failed login monitoring. SecurityAudit provides a complete security monitoring solution for GLPI 11.
plugin.long_description: SecurityAudit provides a complete security monitoring solution for GLPI 11. It automatically logs all actions (create, update, delete) on users, computers, tickets and other objects. It detects weak passwords using a 0-100 scoring engine at creation time (before hashing). Failed login attempts are monitored in real time via a MariaDB trigger — no cron required — and a critical alert is raised after 3 failed attempts within 15 minutes. A security dashboard provides KPIs, activity graphs and unread alert management.
